steps.title: Use the size note
steps.content: The student wants to emphasize Atitalaquia's size. The relevant note is the concrete area measurement: Atitalaquia covers roughly 63 km².

steps.title: Ignore services and categories
steps.content: Choice A discusses street lighting, Choice B identifies Atitalaquia as one of 84 municipalities, and Choice C describes public services. The sentence with the area measurement directly emphasizes size. The answer is D.
